posts.author: MikePScovan (Mike)
posts.cookedHtml:
Apparently this was a function previously but has been… removed?

I’m using a board to manage material transfers, and to submit a request(handled internally) you would need to use a form. The form is created, and I would use it in lieu of the general “New item” button. Apparently this is a feature Monday had at some point because some of our legacy boards do this.

Any tips?

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Mike,

I am not entirely sure if I am understanding your query correctly - would you be happy to elaborate a little further? Forms are certainly still available, now with a new name and feel - All about monday WorkForms. Is this what you’re referencing? Let me know
